subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God that through His favours the sealed paths have been opened, and hearts and souls are [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الحمد لله از الطاف حق راههای مسدود باز شد و دل و جان از
